task_description: Implement Phase 6 (Identity, Permissions, Workspaces, Context Graph) and Phase 7 (Agentic AI Foundation) for the Quant Ecosystem. Phase 6 adds workspace-scoped RBAC, cross-app resource registry, context graph, user-controlled memory, and AI consent management. Phase 7 adds typed tool registry, permission-scoped execution engine, plan generator with approval workflow, cost tracking, safety classification, and 5 end-to-end agent workflows.

verification.summary: All gates pass. typecheck: 72/72, test: 75/75, build: 51/51, lint: 61/61. Tests exercise real code paths (RBAC workspace isolation, execution engine full pipeline, workflow audit/undo/cost tracking) and would fail if implementation were reverted.
